close_reason: Implemented goparse, buckgen libraries and CLI; integrated into Nix; removed gobuckify and patches
description:
Create src/go/pkg/buckgen/ library that generates rules.star files from parsed Go packages.

## Goals
- Generate go_library rules with proper deps
- Handle platform-specific select() for OS/arch constraints
- Support configurable constraint prefixes (config//os:, config//cpu:)
- Generate embed file references

## Structure
```
src/go/pkg/buckgen/
├── render.go       # Template rendering for rules.star
├── normalize.go    # Deduplicate common deps across platforms
└── config.go       # Configuration (compatible with gobuckify.json)
```

## Output Format
Generate rules.star files like:
```python
go_library(
    name = "pkgname",
    srcs = glob(["*.go"]),
    deps = [
        "godeps//vendor/some/pkg:pkg",
    ] + select({
        "config//os:linux": ["godeps//vendor/linux/only:only"],
        "DEFAULT": [],
    }),
)
```

## Reference
- Port template logic from gobuckify's render.go
- Keep JSON config format compatible for easy migration
title: buckgen: BUCK file generation library
